name: smorch-ops
description: SMOrchestra infrastructure + deploy plugin. v1.1 — L3 cascade revision (SOP-36): 7 slash commands (deploy, rollback, drift, health, incident, secrets, skill-sync) + 7 frozen L2 skills (security-hardener, incident-runbook, deploy-pipeline, rollback-runbook, drift-detector, secrets-manager, codex-doctrine). Surgical L3 wiring: /smo-deploy invokes gstack:canary post-deploy, /smo-incident invokes superpowers:systematic-debugging in root-cause phase, /smo-skill-sync extended to bootstrap + verify L3 stack on dev servers (gstack + superpowers + CLAUDE.md, per SOP-37). Runs on all machines including servers. Post-perfctl hardened.
